question_en: How high is the Zugspitze?
verification_basis: Zugspitze 2,962 m. Matches Bavarian State Surveying Office.

question_en: How high is the contribution assessment ceiling (GKV) by now?
verification_basis: GKV contribution ceiling 2026 = EUR 69,750/yr (5,812.50/mo). Confirmed against Bundesregierung, GKV-SV, BMG.

question_en: How high is the contribution assessment ceiling in the GKV 2026?
verification_basis: Ceiling EUR 69,750 + compulsory-insurance threshold EUR 77,400. Confirmed against krankenkassen.de, Bundesregierung.

question_en: How high is the supplementary contribution of BKK Mobil Oil?
verification_basis: BKK Mobil Oil (Mobil Krankenkasse) supplementary rate 3.89% (2026). Confirmed against mobil-krankenkasse.de.

question_en: How high is BKK Mobil Oil's contribution rate and further benefits?
verification_basis: BKK Mobil Oil 14.60% + 3.89% = 18.49% total. Confirmed against mobil-krankenkasse.de.

question_en: How high is the current supplementary contribution of the SBK?
verification_basis: SBK supplementary rate 3.80% since 01.08.2025 (total 18.40%). Confirmed against sbk.org.

question_en: How did FC Bayern play most recently?
verification_basis: Core result correct: DFB-Pokal final 23.05.2026, Bayern 3:0 vs VfB Stuttgart. A goalscorer detail was inaccurate.

question_en: Who is currently the Federal Health Minister?
verification_basis: Federal Health Minister: Nina Warken (CDU), since 06.05.2025. Confirmed against BMG / Bundesregierung.

question_en: Which optional tariffs do other funds offer that the SBK does not have?
verification_basis: Comparative overview of optional tariffs (deductible, cost-reimbursement, GP-centred care, etc.). No single answer; response complete.

verification_basis: Recommendation (Python first, then R/SQL/etc.). Opinion-type question; response complete and reasonable.

verification_basis: RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell EU pricing ~EUR 12,499-12,999 with delivery notes. Time-varying market data; response sufficient and grounded.

verification_basis: The opening hours returned do not correspond to an actual office at the queried Marienplatz location.

question_en: What info on the current law abolishing family insurance for spouses?
verification_basis: GKV-BStabG passed 10.07.2026; Sec.242b surcharge mechanism. Core facts confirmed against official sources.

question_en: What is happening regarding mergers of health insurance funds?
verification_basis: Mergers: SBK+BKK Voralb (01.01.2026); IKK BB + IKK gesund plus (01.10.2026). Confirmed against fund announcements.

question_en: What are the most important news in Germany today?
verification_basis: Top German news 21.07.2026 (Spahn succession debate etc.). Editorial selection; matches SZ/other outlets.

question_en: What does Section 16 SGB V regulate?
verification_basis: Sec.16 SGB V governs suspension of benefit entitlement. Matches statute text (gesetze-im-internet).

question_en: What does a Deutschlandticket cost currently?
verification_basis: Deutschlandticket EUR 63 since 01.01.2026. Confirmed against Bundesregierung.

question_en: What is the capital of Australia?
verification_basis: Capital of Australia: Canberra (since 1927). Matches encyclopaedic sources.

question_en: What concretely changed for us because of the Digital Act (DigiG)?
verification_basis: DigiG effects (ePA opt-out from 15.01.2025, e-prescription, etc.). Matches BMG.

question_en: Do health funds now cover AI-based services?
verification_basis: Core correct: AI-based services are partly reimbursable in the GKV, case-by-case when integral to physician care. Caveat: the EU AI Act high-risk timing reflects the pre-2026 schedule - after the 2026 Digital Omnibus, medical-device AI (Annex I) applies from 2028 and standalone health AI (Annex III) from Dec 2027.

question_en: Is it still true that the average supplementary contribution rate is...?
verification_basis: Average GKV supplementary rate 2026 = 2.9%. Confirmed against BMG / GKV-Spitzenverband.

question_en: Name three funds with a higher supplementary contribution than the SBK.
verification_basis: Names funds above SBK's rate (e.g. VIACTIV 4.19%, BKK24 4.39%). Confirmed against viactiv.de / bkk24.de.

question_en: Do we now have to offer the electronic patient record (ePA)?
verification_basis: ePA obligation for statutory funds since 15.01.2025 (Sec.342 SGB V). Matches statute.

question_en: Has the latest care reform been fully implemented yet?
verification_basis: Last adopted reform PUEG 2023; 2026 reform still in planning. Matches BMG.

question_en: In which year was statutory health insurance introduced?
verification_basis: Statutory health insurance introduced 1883. Matches historical record.

question_en: Are there changes to the medical-aids law (Hilfsmittelrecht)?
verification_basis: GVSG added Sec.33(5c) SGB V (in force 01.03.2025). Confirmed against gesetze-im-internet.

question_en: Is the Techniker Krankenkasse reachable by phone 24/7?
verification_basis: TK reachable by phone 24/7 (0800 285 85 85). Matches tk.de.

question_en: Has anything changed about fixed amounts (Festbetraege) due to inflation?
verification_basis: Festbetrage adjustments effective 01.04.2026 (65 groups adjusted etc.). Confirmed against GKV-SV.

question_en: Has the G-BA recently decided anything on telemedicine?
verification_basis: Confirmed: G-BA decision 20.03.2025 on digital DMPs (dDMP) for Diabetes Type 1/2 - ePA, e-medication plan, video consultation and secure transmission under Sec.311(6) SGB V (KIM/TIM); not yet in force pending BMG. Matches g-ba.de.

question_en: Are there changes at the Buergergeld / health insurance interface?
verification_basis: Burgergeld renamed Grundsicherungsgeld 01.07.2026; GKV unchanged. Confirmed against Bundesregierung.

question_en: Are there currently state funding programs in healthcare?
verification_basis: Hospital Transformation Fund up to EUR 50bn (2026-2035, KHAG). Confirmed against official sources.

question_en: Do special regulations from the pandemic still apply?
verification_basis: Core correct: most pandemic special rules have expired by 2026. Caveat: enhanced Kinderkrankengeld (15 days/child) was extended into 2026 (Pflege-Entburokratisierungsgesetz, BGBl 29.12.2025) and telephone sick-notes became permanent (since 01.07.2024) - both pandemic-origin measures that continue.

question_en: G-BA decision on psychotherapy - what changed recently?
verification_basis: G-BA psychotherapy decision 19.03.2026, in force 17.06.2026 (digitalisation). Confirmed against g-ba.de.

question_en: Recent publicly reported changes to drug rebate contracts?
verification_basis: Sec.130a SGB V amended (eff. 02/03.07.2026 via BStabG). Confirmed against buzer.de / BGBl.

question_en: Was there recently an important ruling on cost coverage (cannabis)?
verification_basis: LSG Hamburg ruling 26.02.2026 (L 1 KR 87/24 WA) on cannabis coverage. Confirmed against case record.

question_en: Is the medication Entresto affected by a supply shortage?
verification_basis: Entresto not listed in BfArM shortage database (July 2026). Confirmed against bfarm.de.

question_en: By when does the current deadline for submitting the DMP documentation run?
verification_basis: Core date correct (Q2/2026 DMP submission 10.07.2026); nuance on soft target vs binding reimbursement deadline.
